svg.title: Developer workflow flowchart
svg.desc: Developer task status flow from Backlog to Done

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Backlog status.')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Pending status.')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Deferred status.')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the In Progress status.')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Testing status.')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Review status.')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Done status.')
